name: HMCS Poundmaker (K 675)
events: 12 Nov 1944 HMS Cleopatra (Capt. B.I. Robertshaw, RN) conducted gunnery exercises off Bermuda.
These were followed by RDF calibration trials and torpedo firing exercises during which the frigate HMCS Poundmaker (T/Lt.Cdr. H.S. Maxwell, RCNVR) served as target. (1)
15 Nov 1944 HMS Cleopatra (Capt. B.I. Robertshaw, RN) conducted gunnery exercises of Bermuda.
In the evening night encounter exercises were carried out with the frigates HMCS Lauzon (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Woods, OBE, RCNR) and HMCS Poundmaker (T/Lt.Cdr. H.S. Maxwell, RCNVR). (1)

2 Dec 1944 HMS Upright (Lt. J.A.L. Wilkinson, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Bermuda with HMCS Poundmaker (T/Lt.Cdr. H.S. Maxwell, RCNVR) and HMCS Cap de la Madeleine (T/Lt.Cdr. R.A. Judges, RCNVR). (2)
